packageRules.description: Group react / react-native and their type & community siblings into a single PR. react-native ships a renderer that must match the installed react version exactly; bumping them in separate PRs causes 'Incompatible React versions' crashes at app start. Renovate has no preset that crosses the react and react-native monorepos, so we group manually.
Constrain Expo SDK 55 managed peers — only bump these via an Expo SDK upgrade. Out-of-range updates break babel-preset-expo's bundled @react-native/codegen.
Pin all expo / @expo / eslint-config-expo packages to the SDK 55 line — bump only via Expo SDK major upgrades.

Hold Ruby on the 3.4 line. CocoaPods (and its xcodeproj/activesupport deps) have no published Ruby 4.0 support, and CocoaPods has historically broken on frozen-string changes — re-evaluate once CocoaPods/Expo announce Ruby 4 support.
